zh.lifeSummary: 當William Dykenson於1270年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾時，他的父親Johnne Dykonson31歲，母親Margaret de Lambert30歲。他於大約1290年與Margaret Clitheral在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1330年1月在他的家鄉享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Dykenson was born in 1270, in Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Johnne Dykonson, was 31 and his mother, Margaret de Lambert, was 30. He married Margaret Clitheral about 1290, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in January 1330, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

Il a épousé Margaret Clitheral environ 1290, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en janvier 1330, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

ko.Kingston-upon-Hull, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 킨그스턴 업 훌
ko.lifeSummary: William Dykenson(이)가 1270년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 킨그스턴 업 훌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johnne Dykonson(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Lambert(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1290년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Margaret Clitheral(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1330년 1월 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.
